title: Flyover Construction Project
tagline: Decongest critical junction at LB Nagar

overview.description: Four-lane elevated flyover spanning 2.8km at LB Nagar junction, targeting 35% reduction in peak-hour wait times.

agentSequence.label: Economic Agent
findings: ₹180M annual productivity savings from reduced congestion
Local retail foot traffic recovers post-construction by month 18
Low fiscal exposure relative to metro-scale projects

agentSequence.label: Social Agent
findings: 350,000 daily commuters benefit from 22-minute average savings
Temporary noise and dust impact on 1,200 adjacent households
Pedestrian access improvements included in design

agentSequence.label: Environmental Agent
findings: Modest emissions reduction from idling traffic elimination
Green belt encroachment: 0.4 hectares — compensatory planting required
Construction dust mitigation plan approved

agentSequence.label: Stakeholder Agent
findings: Commuters strongly support (84%)
Adjacent shop owners concerned during construction (45% oppose short-term)
Government alignment high — quick-win infrastructure

agentSequence.label: Risk Agent
findings: Construction timeline risk: low-medium
Utility relocation delays possible
Minimal land acquisition — elevated design reduces conflict

agentSequence.label: Future Shock Agent
findings: Flyover → Traffic flow → Commercial revival → Property micro-appreciation
Long-term: induced demand may offset gains by 2035 without transit integration
Integration with metro feeder routes amplifies benefit +40%

agentSequence.label: Chief Decision Officer
findings: Viability score: 78/100 — approve with transit integration clause
Low cost, high commuter benefit, manageable environmental footprint
Recommend concurrent metro feeder planning

consequences.label: Traffic Reduction
consequences.description: Project Decision leads to Traffic Reduction

consequences.description: Traffic Reduction leads to Property Value Growth

consequences.description: Property Value Growth leads to Rental Inflation

consequences.description: Rental Inflation leads to Population Migration

recommendation.alternativeScenario: Hybrid flyover + bus rapid transit lane at grade
recommendation.executiveSummary: Flyover Construction Project delivers strong commuter benefits at modest cost. Approve with concurrent transit integration planning.
